description: Create a project-level snapshot for either project status or ad hoc type. This is rate limited to one request per hour for each project and budget view, regardless of snapshot type.

snapshot_type.description: Snapshot Type. Only available when Project Status Snapshots feature is enabled.

approval_status.description: Approval Status. Only available when Project Status Snapshots feature is enabled.

status.description: Custom status object. Only available for project_status_snapshot type when a custom status is assigned.

mapped_to_status.description: The default status this custom status maps to

available.description: Whether the status is available for selection

initial.description: Whether this is the initial status for new snapshots

standard_type.description: The standard type of the status

links.description: Links to get data for this snapshot

detail_rows.description: URL to the Snapshot Detail Rows for this budget view snapshot

summary_rows.description: URL to the Snapshot Summary Rows for this budget view snapshot

budget_template_id.description: The budget template identifier (deprecated, use budget_view_id instead)

name.description: Title of the budget view snapshot

snapshot_type.description: Snapshot Type. Only available when Project Status Snapshots feature is enabled.

status_id.description:
The ID of a custom status.
Only available when the Custom Statuses feature is enabled. When enabled, use this
parameter instead of approval_status. The status_id must reference an available
custom ...
